name: Rupaya 500
overview: To make a livelihood, a naïve maid Ranju fulfills the intimate desires of her owner for mere five hundred rupees. The burly owner has no remorse for his actions and going ahead he shares her with his friends for the same price, but this time Ranju faces a backlash & physical beating when she demands her worth.

trailers.title: Rupaya 500 I Ullu Originals  I Official Trailer I Releasing On 15th June
